message:
test(web): comprehensive E2E + unit test suite for WASM terminal widget

franken-terminal-widget.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium-only):
- Section A (Widget Rendering): section exists, container renders after
  IO-triggered lazy load, canvas attached, loading state observed,
  transitions to running/unsupported, no critical JS errors
- Section B (Interaction): click focus, keyboard capture with
  preventDefault (no page scroll), keyboard unfocused passthrough,
  mouse click error-free, wheel containment with bounding box assertion
- Section C (Sizing): expected dimensions (>300px wide, ~500px tall),
  viewport resize reflows width, small viewport (375x667) no crash
- Section D (Lifecycle): navigate away/back no console errors, widget
  re-initializes with canvas after round-trip navigation
- Section E (Coexistence): page content outside widget interactive,
  page scrolling works when widget unfocused
- Patches IntersectionObserver in headless Chromium for reliable
  lazy-load triggering
- All tests use waitForStableWidgetState() to handle both WebGPU-
  available (running) and unavailable (unsupported) states gracefully
- JSONL diagnostics logging, failure screenshots, filterCriticalErrors
  excludes expected WebGPU/WASM/GPU/WebAssembly/navigator.gpu errors

frankentui-terminal-widget.spec.ts:
- Extended variant with sections A-F including explicit non-WebGPU
  fallback validation and console capture infrastructure

web-demo.spec.ts:
- Full /web standalone demo page E2E: page load, WASM asset delivery
  (version.json, .wasm, .js glue, fonts), browser compat detection,
  responsive viewports, performance metrics, integration with site nav

landing-page-web-integration.spec.ts:
- Validates /web links on homepage and showcase resolve correctly

wasm-loader.test.ts:
- Unit tests for wasm-loader.ts: path resolution, versioned URLs,
  WebGPU detection, singleton cache behavior, cache reset, text asset
  loader error handling

sync-showcase.test.ts + update-web-demo.test.ts:
- Shell script validation tests for the sync and update pipelines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
